overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic dystopian city during golden hour. The character moves from a sidewalk alongside a busy road, through an open plaza with a massive cylindrical building featuring a digital face billboard, and continues along streets lined with construction barriers toward a distinctive spherical structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with vegetated hillside

events.description: character steps off sidewalk and begins crossing the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside a busy road, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk, passing by the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the hillside on the right side of the road
dense overgrown grass and shrubs covering the sloped embankment
tall glass and steel skyscrapers with construction cranes visible against the skyline
asphalt road with multiple lanes of traffic moving in both directions
metal barrier separating the sidewalk from the road traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character walking along a concrete sidewalk next to a multi-lane road. Palm trees and dense vegetation cover a hillside to the right, while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance. The character walks past an opposing pedestrian and approaches an intersection, then steps off the curb to cross the road as vehicles pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with massive cylindrical building and digital advertising

events.description: exits roadside sidewalk and enters open plaza area dominated by a large red cylindrical structure
passing construction barriers and temporary walls, entering a more industrial zone

agents.ego_description: crossing the road and entering the plaza, moving toward the large cylindrical building with the digital billboard

entered.detail: massive cylindrical structure with horizontal red stripes and industrial architecture
giant digital screen wrapped around the cylinder displaying a woman's face
wide open concrete plaza area with scattered debris and puddles
steam rising from ground vents in the plaza
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings in the distance
temporary concrete and metal barriers blocking off sections of the plaza
large geodesic dome structure visible in the distance between buildings
building with distinctive yellow and black hazard stripes

segments.scene_description: The character crosses into an open urban plaza dominated by a massive red cylindrical building featuring a giant digital billboard displaying a woman's face. Steam rises from ground vents as the character moves through the concrete plaza. Construction barriers appear, and a distinctive spherical structure becomes visible in the distance between the futuristic towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with construction barriers and industrial decay

events.description: camera turns slightly left and continues along the street past parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past construction barriers and abandoned vehicles, heading toward the spherical structure

entered.detail: abandoned rusted truck parked on the side of the road
cracked and worn asphalt with patches of dirt and debris
dark smoke rising from behind buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a damaged city street lined with construction barriers on the left and abandoned rusted vehicles on the right. The spherical geodesic structure looms larger in the center of the view as the character approaches. Smoke rises in the distance beyond the yellow and black striped building, and the environment shows signs of industrial decay and neglect.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling city sidewalk into a decaying urban plaza dominated by monolithic futuristic architecture. It begins by following a character along a concrete walkway beside a multi-lane road, passing palm trees and distant skyscrapers before the character steps off the curb to cross the street. As the character enters an open plaza, the environment shifts toward a massive red cylindrical building featuring a giant digital billboard of a woman's face, with steam rising from vents in the concrete. The scene then transitions into a damaged city street lined with construction barriers and rusted vehicles, where the atmosphere becomes increasingly industrial and neglected. Finally, the camera pushes forward as a distinctive spherical geodesic structure looms larger in the center of the view against a backdrop of rising smoke.
